---
title: "Teaching"
---

## London School of Economics and Political Science

**Department of Economics**

| Term | Course |
|------|--------|
| Fall 2025 | EC2C3 · Econometrics I |
| Winter 2026 | EC2C1 · Econometrics II |

## University of Toronto

**Department of Economics** · Sept 2021 – Apr 2022

| Term | Course |
|------|--------|
| Fall 2021 | ECO372 · Data Analysis and Applied Econometrics in Practice |
| Winter 2022 | ECO102 · Principles of Macroeconomics |

## Monash University

**Department of Econometrics and Business Statistics** · Feb 2018 – Jul 2021

| Course | Title |
|--------|-------|
| ETC1000 | Business and Economic Statistics |
| ETC2410 | Introductory Econometrics |
| ETC3400 | Principles of Econometrics |
| ETC3460 | Financial Econometrics |
| ETF3600 | Quantitative Analysis of Limited Dependent Variables *(Caulfield)* |
| ETF5930 | Financial Econometrics *(Caulfield)* |
| ETX2250 | Data Visualisation and Analytics |

**Department of Finance** · Feb 2019 – Dec 2020

| Course | Title |
|--------|-------|
| BFC3241 | Equities and Investment Analysis |

**Department of Economics** · Aug 2018 – Dec 2019

| Course | Title |
|--------|-------|
| ECC1000 | Principles of Microeconomics |
| ECC1100 | Principles of Macroeconomics |

## University of Melbourne

**Melbourne Business School** · Feb 2020 – May 2020

| Course | Title |
|--------|-------|
| BUSA90499 | Introduction to Business Problems |
| BUSA90500 | Business Analytics Foundations (Statistical Learning I) |
